project_area: Summer youth programs focusing on education, mentorship, arts, sports, leadership, and wellness
demographic_requirements: Baltimore City youth who may otherwise be unable to attend summer programming
eligibility_summary: Open to youth-serving organizations in Baltimore City, including nonprofits, public and private institutions. Programs must align with SFC priorities such as safe spaces, accessibility, mentorship, career/academic training, and intergenerational engagement. Priority given to programs recommended by youth reviewers (ages 14-24).
